What You Get

Built for Modded Minecraft

Everything you need to run heavy modpacks smoothly.

Instant Modpack Installation

One-click installation for popular modpacks including Create, Fabric, and Forge packs. Get your server running in minutes.

High RAM Plans

Plans up to 64GB RAM perfect for heavy modpacks like Create Unbound and tech-focused packs with large factories.

24/7 Human Support

Real humans available around the clock. No AI bots. Get actual help when you need it most.

Custom Game Panel

Easy-to-use control panel with built-in mod/plugin installers, file manager, and server console.

Premium Hardware

High-performance NVMe SSDs and latest-gen processors for smooth gameplay even with 200+ mods.

Affordable Pricing

Starting at just $0.87/GB - up to 70% cheaper than competitors without sacrificing quality.

Our Partnership

Why We Chose Kinetic

We partnered with Kinetic Hosting because they understand modded Minecraft. Their servers handle our Create modpacks flawlessly, and their support team actually knows what they're doing. When our community members have issues, they get real help and not automated responses.

  • Handles 200+ mod modpacks without lag
  • One-click installer for our modpacks
  • Real human support that knows modded MC
  • Competitive pricing for high-RAM plans

— FabiMvurice Interactive Team

FAQ

Common Questions

Can I install FabiMvurice modpacks on Kinetic?

Yes! Kinetic Hosting supports one-click installation for popular modpacks. You can also upload any custom modpack via their file manager.

How much RAM do I need?

It depends on your modpack. Vanilla+ packs like Additions run great on 4 GB. Create-based packs need 6-8 GB. For large servers with many players, consider 16 GB+.

Does using the affiliate link cost me more?

No! Using our affiliate link costs you nothing extra. You get the same prices as everyone else, and it helps support FabiMvurice Interactive.

Can I switch modpacks later?

Yes, you can change your modpack at any time through the control panel. Your world data is preserved when switching between compatible versions.

Ready to Host Your Server?

Join thousands of players who trust Kinetic Hosting for their modded servers.

Get Started Now

Using our link supports us at no extra cost to you.
